Simulations

Built for Deep-Tech Teams

Enterprise-grade features for serious chip design. No approximations. Real physics.

Enterprise

Real Physics Engine

Actual CMOS equations, not approximations. Propagation delay, power, thermal effects modeled accurately.

Privacy First

Local AI Co-pilot

Ollama-powered design assistance. No cloud APIs. Runs 100% on your infrastructure.

Production Ready

50x Performance

FastAPI async backend with optimized physics engine. Simulate in milliseconds, not seconds.

Tapeout Ready

Advanced PVT Analysis

All corners, temperatures, voltages. Corner summary or complete sweep with statistical analysis.

AI-Driven

ADA Optimizer

Autonomous design agent. Pareto front exploration. 10,000+ design variations in minutes.

Predictive

Digital Twin

Aging prediction with NBTI, HCI, EM models. Reliability forecasting for product lifetime.

Enterprise-Grade Tech Stack

Frontend

Backend

FastAPI + Python 3.11

ML Framework
